Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter investigates a theft turned murder when a robbery victim hires a detective to retrieve stolen jewels.
Video.title: Death Machine

Video.summary: The search for a vengeful woman suspected of murdering two men involved in her sister's cocaine-related death.
Video.title: True Confessions

Video.summary: A star high-school hockey player and friend of the Scali family - becomes a prime drug-ring suspect.
Video.title: The Puck Stops Here

Video.summary: When a dead girl disappears from Hunter's living room, he and McCall follow a trail of intrigue and murder.
Video.title: The Beautiful & The Dead, Part 1

Video.summary: Tony winds up in one of his own jail cells when he runs afoul of an imperious judge.
Video.title: Judgement Day

Video.summary: Tony attempts to protect an informant from a mysterious hit man.
Video.title: Shoot The Breeze

Video.summary: Commissioner -- and expectant father -- Tony Scali suddenly finds his own life on the line after he infiltrates a New York pornographic teenage film ring.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 1

Video.summary: A police detective aids in solving a series of murders connected to the estate of a deceased millionaire.
Video.title: From San Francisco With Love

Video.summary: After Tony arrests Stan's murderer and Ross is convicted, he and his family must take refuge
Video.title: The Iceman Cometh

Video.summary: Wrongly suspended from the force for beating a suspect, Hunter pursues the gangster who had him discredited.
Video.title: The Setup

Video.summary: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.
Video.title: The Cradle Will Rock

Video.summary: Hunter receives a death threat from a quick-tempered foreign official determined to avenge his brother's death
Video.title: High Noon In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall investigate a student terror group in the car bombing of a Middle-Eastern consulate member.
Video.title: 62 Hrs. Of Terror

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist.
Video.title: The Contract

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall try to protect their informant, Sporty James, after he blackmails a ruthless cocaine dealer.
Video.title: Love, Hate And Sporty James

Video.summary: When a dying contract killer confesses he was paid to kill Hunter's father, Hunter pursues the true murderer.
Video.title: Scrap Metal

Video.summary: Tony is enraged as a publicity-seeking "video vigilante" metes out punishment to offenders.
Video.title: Video Vigilante

Video.summary: Tony and Paulie investigate a puzzling arson case.
Video.title: Sex, Lies, and Kerosene

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall are given 72 hours to find an attorney who falsified his death.
Video.title: Burned

Video.summary: A teenager's death leads Hunter and McCall to a Fagin who commands a group of barrio boys to commit crimes.
Video.title: Fagin 1986

Video.summary: Reno falls into a deadly trap when false news reports claim that Valerie Prentice, his comatose fiancee, has awakened.
Video.title: Val's Song

Video.summary: Reno assists a stranded motorist change her flat tire who later turns up dead.
Video.title: Give And Take

Video.summary: Reno's latest bounty kidnaps a wealthy Japanese businessman's daughter.
Video.title: Samurai

Video.summary: Appearances are deceiving, when Reno discovers a look alike is committing crimes in his name.
Video.title: The Two Renos
